menu.name: Butter Chicken
menu.description: Creamy tomato-based curry with tender chicken, slow-cooked with aromatic spices, finished with butter and cream.

menu.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
menu.description: Fresh cottage cheese grilled in tandoor, simmered in rich creamy tomato gravy.

menu.name: Lamb Biryani
menu.description: Fragrant basmati layered with tender lamb, caramelized onions, saffron, slow-cooked in sealed pot.

menu.name: Tandoori Platter
menu.description: Royal feast of tandoori chicken, seekh kebab, reshmi kebab, fish tikka with mint chutney.

menu.name: Chicken Tikka
menu.description: Boneless tandoor-charred chicken with smoked yogurt and saffron.

menu.name: Dal Makhani
menu.description: Black lentils slow-cooked overnight with butter, cream, and aromatic spices.

menu.name: Palak Paneer
menu.description: Fresh spinach puree with soft paneer cubes, tempered with cumin and garlic.

menu.name: Butter Naan
menu.description: Soft tandoor-baked flatbread brushed with cultured butter.

menu.name: Garlic Naan
menu.description: Naan crusted with roasted garlic and coriander.

menu.name: Jeera Rice
menu.description: Basmati rice tempered with cumin seeds and ghee.

menu.name: Gulab Jamun
menu.description: Soft milk dumplings soaked in rose-flavored sugar syrup, served warm.

menu.name: Rasmalai
menu.description: Delicate cottage cheese patties in saffron-cardamom milk.

menu.name: Masala Chai
menu.description: Black tea boiled with ginger, cardamom, cloves.

menu.name: Mango Lassi
menu.description: Chilled yogurt blended with fresh Alphonso mango pulp.
